title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter for Archon, an AI coding workflow platform. The integration enables automated bug fixes and pull request creation directly from Jira tickets, with each ticket receiving a dedicated conversation context for custom workflows.
